meta_description: Decode your .PL8 files (+ .256 palette) to PNG, right in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
hero_subtitle: Drop a .PL8 file and its .256 palette: decoding runs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your machine.
about_body: The .PL8 format is a paged sprite format used by some DOS games. The decoding engine (RLE, palette mapping, trimming) runs entirely client-side in JavaScript: no upload, no server.
copyright_note: ⚠️ This tool ships no game assets. You bring your own files, extracted from a copy you own.
err_need_both: Load a .PL8 file and a .256 palette first.
err_not_ready: The decoding engine isn't wired in yet (see src/decode.js).
